full_text:
Quan Ji 全紀
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Quan Ji (全紀). Brother-in-law of Sun Liang. Ordered to kill Sun Chen by Sun Liang, but was executed. Quan Ji was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Quan Ji lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
